name: Juniper Spice (American)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the spices to a fine consistency.
2. Finely crumble the dried bay leaves.
3. Combine all the ground spices and crumbled bay leaves in a bowl until evenly mixed.
This aromatic blend pairs well with dense-textured fish like monkfish, fresh tuna, and swordfish, as well as steaks and lamb dishes.
